questions.question: Explain the concept of Linked List and its types (Singly Linked List and Doubly Linked List) with suitable diagrams, and list its applications in real-life scenarios.
questions.hint: Refer to chapter 4.5 of the textbook

questions.question: Write a program in Python to demonstrate the insertion and deletion operations of a Singly Linked List. Also, explain the time complexities of these operations.
questions.hint: Use the concepts learned from chapter 4.5 of the textbook

questions.question: Compare and contrast Stacks and Queues data structures in terms of their operations, advantages, and applications. Provide code examples in Python to illustrate your points.
questions.hint: Refer to chapter 4.5 of the textbook for details
